task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Oscar EMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oscar EMR main dashboard or a logged-in state indicating the user 'oscardoc' has successfully authenticated.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the pharmacy directory or the 'Add Pharmacy' form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form, modal, or page titled 'Add Pharmacy', 'Pharmacy Search', or a similar directory management screen within the Oscar EMR interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct pharmacy name and address details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Lakeshore Compounding Pharmacy', '742 Lakeshore Boulevard West', 'Toronto', 'ON', and 'M5V 1A5' populated in the respective name and address input fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct phone, fax, and email details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text '416-555-0198' (Phone), '416-555-0199' (Fax), and 'rx@lakeshorecompounding.ca' (Email) populated in the respective contact input fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct notes for the pharmacy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Specializes in compounding' populated in the notes, comments, or description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the new pharmacy was successfully saved to the directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success/confirmation message (e.g., 'Saved', 'Pharmacy added'), or the newly added 'Lakeshore Compounding Pharmacy' appearing as an entry in the pharmacy directory list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Oscar EMR web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Oscar EMR interface in a web browser. The agent should not be typing the details into a plain text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard typing and clicking actions within the browser's form fields. There should be no evidence of the agent using browser developer tools (console) or terminal scripts to inject the data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the frontend to add the pharmacy.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the absence of terminal windows running SQL commands or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or pgAdmin) being used to insert the pharmacy record directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Toronto is a real city in Ontario (ON), Canada. Postal code M5V 1A5 is a valid downtown Toronto postal code format. The rest of the pharmacy details (name, address, phone, fax, email) are synthetic and fictional.
